case_title: TURGMAN MAHA VS SELIG ELIZABETH IND/DBA. AMERICAN GYMNASTICS CLUBS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SELIG ELIZABETH IND/DBA. AMERICAN GYMNASTICS CLUBS
